channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
item.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

item.title: Multimodal RAG with the Gemini API File Search Tool: A Developer Guide
item.description: The File Search tool in the Gemini API now supports multimodal retrieval by adding support for Gemini Embedding 2. This update allows images, such as charts, product photos, and diagrams, to be...

item.title: Building a Zulip Style Collaborative Chat App with Next.js and Velt
item.description: Zulip is known for keeping conversations organized. Topic-based threads, clear context, and async-friendly discussions make it a favorite for technical and distributed teams. Unlike traditional...

item.title: Beyond the Code: Mentoring the Next Generation of Engineers at Six Flags
item.description: Technology is often viewed through the lens of lines of code and GitHub commits, but its true impact lies in the community it builds. Recently, representatives from Open Source with SLU stepped...

item.title: Demystifying Mapbox Styles
item.description: If you've spent any time building digital maps with Mapbox, you've used a style — but you may not have given it much thought. Most tutorials and example code abstract it down to a single URL, and...

item.title: Your Prompts are Legacy Code Now: The Google Cloud Next '26 Developer Breakdown
item.description: The era of "chatting with an LLM" is officially legacy. I've attended the Google Cloud Next ‘26 Developer Keynote, and saw the pivot point. We aren’t just writing better prompts anymore; we are...

item.title: I Built a Job Hunt System for Developers. Here is Why You Need It.
item.description: Job hunting as a developer is broken. You send 50 applications. You hear back from 2. One is a rejection. The other is a ghost. This happened to me over and over. I knew I had the skills. But my...

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of...

item.title: IBM didn't want Microsoft to use the Tab key to move between dialog fields
item.description: Article URL: https://devblogs.microsoft.com/oldnewthing/20260505-00/?p=112298 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48025687 Points: 13 # Comments: 1

item.title: Linear Search vs Binary Search (and Why It Actually Matters)
item.description: When you're working with data, one of the most common things your code does is search. Let's say you have a list of users, transactions, or even just numbers. How you search through that data can...

item.title: Blueprint: Declare Your Dev Environment Once, Apply It Anywhere
item.description: Your README has a Setup section. It has eight steps, two of them are out of date, and step 5 assumes you're on macOS. A new dev joins the team and spends their first afternoon figuring out which...

item.title: 5 best usage-based billing platforms for vibe coders
item.description: The best usage-based billing platforms for vibe coders include Credyt for real-time AI billing with prompt-based setup inside Cursor, Lovable, Bolt, and Claude Code, Stripe Billing for...

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
item.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

item.title: OpenAI claims ChatGPT’s new default model hallucinates way less
item.description: OpenAI's newest default model for ChatGPT might not make stuff up as much. Hallucinations have been an ongoing problem for AI models, but OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 Instant model has "significant...

item.title: Meta sued by major book publishers over copyright infringement
item.description: Meta is facing a class action lawsuit filed by five major book publishers and one author over claims the company "engaged in one of the most massive infringements of copyrighted materials in...

item.title: Microsoft’s new Xbox shake-up is all about platform changes
item.description: Microsoft's new Xbox chief, Asha Sharma, has spent the past couple of months making her mark on the Xbox organization. After focusing on highly requested Xbox console features, reducing the price...

item.title: Critical Apache HTTP/2 Flaw (CVE-2026-23918) Enables DoS and Potential RCE
item.description: The Apache Software Foundation (ASF) has released security updates to address several security vulnerabilities in the HTTP Server, including a severe vulnerability that could potentially lead to...

item.title: From Alan Shepard to Artemis, celebrating 65 years of Americans in space
item.description: On the morning of May 5th, 1961, 37-year-old Alan Shepard woke up, ate a breakfast (consisting of a filet mignon wrapped in bacon, scrambled eggs, and orange juice), strapped into the Freedom 7...

item.title: DAEMON Tools Supply Chain Attack Compromises Official Installers with Malware
item.description: A newly identified supply chain attack targeting DAEMON Tools software has compromised its installers to serve a malicious payload, according to findings from Kaspersky. "These installers are...

item.title: The new AirPods Max 2 are already on sale for $40 off
item.description: In terms of pricing, the original AirPods Max remained stubbornly high even years after their debut, which made them hard to recommend over the Bose QC Ultra or Sony’s XM series headphones unless...

item.title: Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.
item.description: Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.

item.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
item.description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

item.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
item.description: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational shopping experience for users.

item.title: Orchid, the buzzy Tame Impala synth, is back in a gorgeous clear colorway
item.description: The Telepathic Instruments Orchid has been unavailable for a few months now. But a new batch is ready to drop on May 11th for $649, and the company is celebrating with a limited edition clear...

item.title: OpenAI is reportedly launching a phone for ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's first hardware product might be a phone instead of a mysterious Jony Ive gadget. As reported by MacRumors, supply chain analyst Ming-Chi Kuo shared details about the rumored phone,...

item.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
item.description: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.

item.title: Google, Microsoft, and xAI will allow the US government to review their new AI models
item.description: Google DeepMind, Microsoft, and Elon Musk's xAI have agreed to allow the US government to review new AI models before they're released to the public. In an announcement on Tuesday, the Commerce...

item.title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors
item.description: ElevenLabs reveals new investors, hits $500M ARR, and expands enterprise footprint as voice AI becomes a critical interface.

item.title: China-Linked UAT-8302 Targets Governments Using Shared APT Malware Across Regions
item.description: A sophisticated China-nexus advanced persistent threat (APT) group has been attributed to attacks targeting government entities in South America since at least late 2024 and government agencies in...

item.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
item.description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
